name: Suraj Gola
role: Full Stack Developer | AI & Backend Enthusiast
bio: B.Tech CSE student and full-stack developer with strong interest in backend systems, AI, and real-world problem solving. Experienced in building scalable projects, participating in national hackathons, and publishing research.
objective: To build impactful and scalable technology solutions by leveraging skills in backend development, AI, and system design while continuously learning and contributing to innovative projects.

projects.title: CareMatrix
projects.description: Engineered an AI-powered healthcare system for patient monitoring and decision support. Enabled real-time insights and improved healthcare management efficiency.

projects.title: Smart Yatra
projects.description: Developed a smart travel platform for efficient trip planning and route optimization. Enhanced user experience through structured data handling.

projects.title: Repo Scanning System
projects.description: Built an automated repository scanning tool to detect security vulnerabilities and code inefficiencies, improving code quality and safety.

projects.title: Emergency Vehicle Road Clearance System
projects.description: Developed a smart system to prioritize emergency vehicles by clearing traffic lanes in advance using automation and hardware integration.

achievements.title: Plaksha Young Creators League (YCL)
achievements.description: Selected in Top 50 out of 1058 teams for national-level exhibition. Presented Emergency Vehicle Road Clearance System.

achievements.title: CodeSphere Hackathon
achievements.description: Secured winning position among competing teams. Selected for ACIC Incubation Program at SGT University to scale the project.

achievements.title: PW Hackathon
achievements.description: Participated in a national-level hackathon. Built a functional prototype solving real-world problems under time constraints.

achievements.title: Research Paper Publication
achievements.description: Published and presented a research paper in a reputed conference/book, showcasing research and technical documentation skills.

sections.title: Summary
sections.content: B.Tech CSE student with strong interest in backend development, AI, and automation. Experienced in building real-world projects, leading teams, and participating in national-level hackathons.

sections.title: Key Achievements
sections.content:
• Winner - CodeSphere Hackathon
• Selected for ACIC Incubation Program at SGT University
• Top 50 out of 1058 teams - Plaksha YCL
• Published research paper in reputed conference/book
• Built multiple real-world projects in AI, backend, and IoT
